other_observers: Glenn Walbek, Larry Modesitt, Steve Larson, Roger Lindfield, Joe Roller and Maggie Bosweld.; Glenn orginnaly had these birds on his Bonny CBC.
specific_location: North of Bonny Res. in a shelter belt of Junipers.
description: The rasberry purple of the male and the bold face pattern of the female made the ID of the birds straight forward. Bold short fat streaks on the female breast and notched tails of both birds were also diagnostic. Got some good pictures which are attached. Was a state bird for me.Behaviors: Eating cedar berrys as the photos show. In a small flock of 10-15.Call: NonePlumage: N/A
